name: Bang Bang Chicken
recipeInstructions:
This cooked chicken meat is a popular dish from Szechuan in China.
Bring the water to boil in a large saucepan. Add the chicken pieces, reduce the heat, cover and simmer 30 to 35 minutes. Remove the chicken from the pan and immerse it in a bowl of cool water for at least 1 hour to cool it down before shredding. Using a draining spoon, remove the chicken pieces and drain well. Pat dry with paper towels. Strip all the meat from the bones. On a flat surface, use a rolling pin to pound the chicken to flatten it. Tear the meat into shreds with two forks. Mix with shredded cucumber and arrange in a serving dish. To serve, mix together all the sauce ingredients. Pour over the chicken and cucumber.
